chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Generosity and Munificence

text: اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَنْ يَضْمَنُ لِي أَرْبَعَةً بِأَرْبَعَةِ أَبْيَاتٍ فِي اَلْجَنَّةِ أَنْفِقْ وَ لاَ تَخَفْ فَقْراً وَ أَنْصِفِ اَلنَّاسَ مِنْ نَفْسِكَ وَ أَفْشِ اَلسَّلاَمَ فِي اَلْعَالَمِ وَ اُتْرُكِ اَلْمِرَاءَ وَ إِنْ كُنْتَ مُحِقّاً».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1711 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Whoever guarantees me four things, I will guarantee for him four chambers in Paradise: Spend and do not fear poverty, treat people with fairness, spread peace throughout the world, and abandon arguments, even if you are right."
